versions.command: .venv/bin/locma depot publish e36m1 runs/e36_m1_ship/e36_m1_gen0.zip runs/e36_m1_ship/e36_m1_gen1.zip runs/e36_m1_ship/e36_m1_gen2.zip runs/e36_m1_ship/e36_m1_gen3.zip runs/e36_m1_ship/e36_m1_gen4.zip runs/e36_m1_ship/e36_m1_gen5.zip runs/e36_m1_ship/e36_m1_gen6.zip runs/e36_m1_ship/e36_m1_gen7.zip runs/e36_m1_ship/e36_m1_history.json runs/e36_m1_ship/e36_m1_history_gen4+.json runs/e36_m1_ship/m1_gen0-3.log runs/e36_m1_ship/m1_gen4-7.log --kind model --parent e29slim@1 --note E36 PFSP independent replication chain, M1 Max/CPU, seed 20M, n_envs 12, 1.5M steps/gen, gen0-7. Internal FP health passed gen0-4 (0.60/0.605/0.565/0.555/0.52 vs prior self), H2H plateau ~coin-flip gen5-7, anchors held (boardkeep 0.835-0.885). Held-out gate eval PENDING - confirmation evidence for x86 gen7 candidate, not the candidate itself. --meta {"seed": 20000000, "n_envs": 12, "platform": "m1-cpu", "steps_per_gen": 1500000, "generations": 8, "internal_h2h": [0.600, 0.605, 0.565, 0.555, 0.520, 0.490, 0.515, 0.505], "gate_eval": "pending"}
versions.note: E36 PFSP independent replication chain, M1 Max/CPU, seed 20M, n_envs 12, 1.5M steps/gen, gen0-7. Internal FP health passed gen0-4 (0.60/0.605/0.565/0.555/0.52 vs prior self), H2H plateau ~coin-flip gen5-7, anchors held (boardkeep 0.835-0.885). Held-out gate eval PENDING - confirmation evidence for x86 gen7 candidate, not the candidate itself.
